release_review.summary: Desktop adds the Runtime Placement Bridge so Local and SSH container runtime targets can expose Local UI and runtime-control through a managed byte-stream transport without published container ports.
checked_surfaces: Runtime Placement Bridge CLI command and stdio frame protocol
Runtime Placement Bridge Local UI byte-stream forwarding for HTTP, SSE, WebSocket, and runtime-control
Desktop container target host_access plus placement persistence schema
Desktop Welcome Local Container and SSH Container managed runtime cards
Desktop provider-link resolver for bridge-backed Local and SSH container targets
Runtime Service provider_link capability and binding normalization
Desktop startup reports and attachable runtime state runtime_control metadata
Desktop Welcome Local, SSH, and container Open and Start Runtime separation
Desktop Welcome provider Connect Runtime and Disconnect Runtime actions
Runtime-control provider-link HTTP authorization and structured errors
Runtime provider bootstrap exchange, config persistence, and control-channel lifecycle
Local UI health and runtime state token exposure boundaries
